rag_rules: AGREE annex blocks must be placed in component implementation annexes for implementation-level bindings
Use assign statements only for existing output features or declared auxiliary variables in implementation scope
generic_rules: Preserve AADL architecture by inserting annex blocks at appropriate component or implementation levels
Avoid placing guarantee statements in implementation scope; use type scope for output dependency contracts
Do not use implementation-only subcomponent paths in component type annexes
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE contracts are enclosed in `annex agree {** ... **};` blocks
Implementation contracts use assign for binding visible outputs to expressions
anti_patterns: Do not place guarantee statements in implementation scope
Do not reference implementation-only subcomponent paths in type annexes
irrelevant_topics: AGREE validator diagnostics and repair patterns
AADL structural extraction of component types and features
